summary: Iteration 2 tests: MSG91 WhatsApp LIVE + Counsellor Cockpit. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases passed. Frontend: cockpit renders for counsellor with all required data-testids, KPI/demo/followup/overdue rows populated, lead-detail navigation works, and admin correctly does NOT get the cockpit.

issues: React hydration warnings: <span> inside <tbody> and <tr>. Not part of cockpit feature but visible in console — worth cleaning up eventually.

critical_code_review_comments: MSG91 live sends succeed: enquiry_saved & demo_booked both return success=true with non-empty request_id (verified real MSG91 API call).
Admin-only guard on /api/admin/whatsapp-test correctly returns 403 for counsellor.
scheduled_demos + upcoming_followups shapes exactly match spec; sorted asc; windowed to [today, today+7d] and (today, today+7d] respectively.
Old counsellor dashboards (counsellor-dashboard / counsellor-action-dashboard / counsellor-performance-panel) are no longer rendered — only CounsellorCockpit shows for counsellor role.
Minor: hydration warning on lead detail page (<span> inside <tbody>) — pre-existing, unrelated to this iteration.
test_credentials: Admin admin@etieducom.com/admin@123; Counsellor priya@eti.com/priya@123; login uses OAuth2 form (username/password fields).
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (9 leads with seed_demo:true, 7 followups, 2 enrollments) owned by priya@eti.com. Not deleted per instructions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_2_msg91_and_cockpit.py can be re-run for regression. Login endpoint /api/auth/login uses form-encoded data with 'username' field, not JSON with 'email'. Template_name for demo_booked event is inside response.debug.template_name (not top-level). Real MSG91 sends are performed — expect a small fee/usage each run.
